headline: Consumer Discretionary - Casino Operator Stocks Q4 Teardown: Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) Vs The Rest
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) and the rest of the consumer discretionary - casino operator stocks fared in Q4.
